name: nexus-one-react

scripts.test: npm run livecare:test && npm run ai:test && npm run executive:test && npm run foundation:test && npm run test:i18n
scripts.restart: taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>nul & npm run build && npm start
scripts.refresh: taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>nul & npm test && npm run build && npm start
scripts.verify: npm run env:check && npm run db:check && npm run a11y:check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run livecare:test && npm run ai:test && npm run executive:test && npm run foundation:test
scripts.ci: npm ci && npm run verify && npm run test:i18n

description: NEXUS ONE Healthcare Mobility Platform with LiveCare and operational modules
